channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Metal balls from space are popping up on Australia's beaches
item.description: Sadly, we don't think aliens were involved in this particular space balls incident.

item.title: Vélos électriques Angell : l’interminable bras de fer à plusieurs millions d’euros qui paralyse des milliers de clients
item.description: Repris par Rebirth à l’été 2025, Angell reste suspendu à une bataille de responsabilités entre SEB, Kickmaker et les différents acteurs de sa chaîne industrielle. Tandis que le repreneur affirme pousser pour une solution de remplacement, de nombreux clients réclament surtout un remboursement et dénoncent une attente devenue interminable. Entre vélos immobilisés, problèmes de connectivité et avenir incertain de la marque, le dossier Angell demeure enlisé dans un bras de fer où chacun attend de savoir qui paiera. ...

item.title: Enterprise AI is entering an evaluation gap: Agents are gaining autonomy faster than companies can verify them
item.description: Enterprise AI teams are giving agents more freedom at the same moment their confidence in automated testing is collapsing.Half of enterprises have deployed an AI agent or LLM feature that passed internal evaluations and yet still caused a customer-facing failure — one in four more than once — according to the June 2026 VB Pulse survey of 157 qualified enterprise respondents at companies with 100 or more employees.The sample is self-selected rather than a probability sample, so the findings should be read as directional, not precise.But enterprises are not responding by slowing automation: 66% ...

item.title: 'Today, the token economy is emerging': AI use in China increases 1000-fold with usage exceeding 140 trillion tokens a day
item.description: With AI token consumption rising dramatically since 2024, AI companies are adapting their pricing to be based on consumption.

item.title: Meet the Battery Startup Taking on China’s Giants
item.description: Solid-state batteries are safer and more capable—but harder to mass-produce. They also represent an opportunity for non-Chinese companies to get back in the game.

item.title: I tested PSB's new stereo speaker system and the punchy sound and compact styling are a delight, but don't bother if you listen to a lot of vinyl
item.description: The PSB iQ2 may be the largest model in the brand's stereo speaker range, but it's still pretty small — can it justify its big price-tag?

item.title: J’ai testé le Hisense UR8S : le premier TV RGB Mini LED polyvalent compatible Dolby Vision 2
item.description: En 2026, pour Hisense, la série de téléviseurs UR8S se positionne comme le RGB Mini LED accessible, taillé pour aller titiller des références bien plus chères. L'enjeu de ce test : vérifier si ce nouveau système de rétroéclairage mérite vraiment le titre de technologie de l'année.

item.title: Filing: College app Fizz accuses VC of sharing confidential startup information with rival Sidechat
item.description: Fizz has expanded its lawsuit against rival Sidechat, alleging that a Maveron VC shared its confidential information obtained during a fundraising meeting with the competing startup.

item.title: OpenAI is shutting down its Atlas web browser
item.description: Atlas will be shutting down as OpenAI introduces ChatGPT Work.

item.title: Facebook and Instagram violate laws due to addictive design, EU finds
item.description: The European Union found that Meta services like Facebook and Instagram are too addictive by design.

item.title: Netflix, Paramount, Sony and others are reportedly in talks to buy Letterboxd
item.description: The movie-centric social network is said to be seeking new ownership.

item.title: Nvidia’s biggest RAM supplier just had a trillion-dollar debut on Wall Street
item.description: As the AI boom boosts demand for RAM, SK Hynix - one of the world's biggest suppliers of memory chips - launched on Wall Street Friday. The South Korean chipmaker opened at $170 per share and raised $26.5 billion, surpassing Alibaba's record as the largest debut of a foreign company, according to reports from Associated […]

item.title: La 3e démarque des soldes d’été bat son plein : voici les meilleures promotions Tech du week-end
item.description: Les soldes d'été 2026 s'enrichissent de nouvelles offres grâce à la troisième démarque. Smartphones, TV, PC portables, tablettes, objets connectés... tout y passe ! On continue de faire le tri pour vous proposer en temps réel les meilleures pépites Tech à prix bas.

item.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
item.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

item.title: Can't get enough of the horror hit Obsession? It's got a streaming release date, and it's closer than you think
item.description: Been yearning to stream the year's most successful horror movie? Your wish is about to be granted.

item.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
item.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

item.title: Our hardware editor swears by the 'perfectly balanced' Arzopa Z3FC portable monitor as a daily second screen — and Amazon just dropped the price
item.description: It's an ideal second display for laptops, travel, and small desks.

item.title: Disney might be planning a free Disney+ tier
item.description: Nearly every streaming service has an ad-supported plan, but Disney might take the unusual step of making it free.

item.title: Strava’s new Events tab helps you find local running groups and races, thanks to Runna’s huge database
item.description: Whether you're looking for a run club or a cycling race, Strava will now intelligently recommend local events to take part in

item.title: Spotify will let you fine-tune your weekly Release Radar playlist
item.description: Spotify is giving listeners control to fine-tune what gets surfaced for them in Release Radar - one of its most popular weekly playlists. The new options allow you to narrow the playlist to a specific genre, focus on artists that are new to you, and more. Listeners can choose from up to five options like […]

item.title: I built an agentic AI clone of my family to plan our summer travel
item.description: The results were surprisingly good, with a few important caveats. Planning summer travel is hard. Planning it for a busy family, visiting multiple destinations with three little kids in tow, can feel downright impossible.

item.title: Suicides liés à l’IA | L’Institut Mila crée un filtre pour réduire les risques
item.description: Devant la montée des jeunes qui utilisent des agents conversationnels d’intelligence artificielle (IA) pour obtenir un soutien émotionnel, l’Institut québécois d’intelligence artificielle Mila et ROOST, une organisation technologique mondiale indépendante à but non lucratif, lancent un filtre pour la prévention du suicide.

item.title: China is catching up to Elon Musk’s reusable rockets
item.description: China's state-owned space company recovered its first orbital rocket booster after launch.

item.title: Our expert praised Creality's K2 Plus 3D printer after his workshop tests — and it's just got a massive summer discount
item.description: Creality K2 Plus with the Premium Accessory Pack offers a feature-packed way to step into high-end 3D printing.

item.title: Microsoft discovers new multi-malware package 'GigaWiper' capable of deploying wipers and ransomware
item.description: One wiper can destroy a computer in different ways, but it can also spy on users.

item.title: Canicule : vous ouvrez mal vos fenêtres, cette appli gratuite calcule l’heure parfaite pour le faire
item.description: Ouvrir ses fenêtres au mauvais moment, c'est faire entrer la chaleur au lieu de la chasser. Le simulateur Nadir calcule pour vous les bonnes heures, gratuitement. Et donne des conseils car ce n'est pas juste la lecture d'un thermomètre.

item.title: AI is stealing all the RAM and storage, and I’m learning to live with it
item.description: Thanks to RAMageddon, new devices are getting pricier for the first time in years. Sticking with what you’ve got just became more attractive. Hello again, and welcome back to Fast Company’s Plugged In.
